connectYourAccount.description: Title for the page where users can connect their PREreview profile to their Community Slack account.

youCanConnect.message: You can connect your PREreview profile to your account on the PREreview Community Slack.
youCanConnect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Connect your Community Slack Account”.

showOrcidOnProfile.message: We’ll show your ORCID iD on your Slack profile.
showOrcidOnProfile.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Connect your Community Slack Account”.

beforeYouStart.description: Heading for the section that explains what users need to know before connecting their Community Slack account.

needSlackAccount.message: You need to have an account on the PREreview Community Slack. If you don’t, fill out the <link>registration form</link> to create one.
needSlackAccount.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Before you start” explaining that users need to have a Community Slack account before connecting it to their PREreview profile.

sendYouToSlack.message: We’ll send you to Slack, where they will ask you to log in to the PREreview Community Slack and grant PREreview access to your account there. You may have already done these steps, and Slack will return you to PREreview.
sendYouToSlack.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Before you start” explaining the process of connecting the PREreview profile to the Community Slack account.

cannotConnect.message: Sorry, we can’t connect your account
cannotConnect.description: Heading for the page shown when the user has denied PREreview access to their Community Slack account.

havingProblems.description: Heading for the page shown when there are issues connecting the Community Slack account.

youDeniedAccess.message: You have denied PREreview access to your Community Slack account.
youDeniedAccess.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we can’t connect your account”.

unableToConnect.message: We’re unable to connect your account right now.
unableToConnect.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgain.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we can’t connect your account”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
